operation.name: copyMem_at_postproc_update_buf_state
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun dst_size () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun src_size () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (bvule  (concat  (select  src_size (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  src_size (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  src_size (_ bv1 32) ) (select  src_size (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) (concat  (select  dst_size (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  dst_size (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  dst_size (_ bv1 32) ) (select  dst_size (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

name: WMI-3: Attacker-Determined Content in an Authoritative Position @ postproc_update_buf_state

metadata.bug_type: WMI-3 Attacker-Determined Content in an Authoritative Position

oracle_spec.assertion: has_ring holds trusted, not attacker-determined, content
assumptions: externally-originated content installed into the field
